hasAttributes.name: fi_CardId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the FI Card1.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the FI Card1.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Required name field.

hasAttributes.name: activationDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the card was activated.

hasAttributes.name: cardholder
hasAttributes.description: The customer associated with the card.

hasAttributes.name: cardholderType
hasAttributes.description: The customer associated with the card.

hasAttributes.name: cardNetwork
hasAttributes.description: This is the credit card network, such as Visa, Mastercard, or American Express.

hasAttributes.name: cardnumber
hasAttributes.description: The customer's card number (with appropriate masking, PCI-compliant).

hasAttributes.name: cardType
hasAttributes.description: The type of card held by the customer (Debit or Credit).

hasAttributes.name: dateoflastcashwithdrawal
hasAttributes.description: The date of the last cash withdrawal transaction performed with the card.

hasAttributes.name: dateoflasttransaction
hasAttributes.description: The date of the last transaction performed with the card.

hasAttributes.name: embossingName
hasAttributes.description: The name of the customer as it was embossed on the card.

hasAttributes.name: expiryDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the card will expire.

hasAttributes.name: financialinstrumenttype
hasAttributes.description: The type of financial instrument (Direct debit, Standing order, Card, Overdraft).

hasAttributes.name: integrationKey
hasAttributes.description: Used by the system integrator to uniquely define the data record .

hasAttributes.name: issueDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the card was issued.

hasAttributes.name: numberofcashwithdrawal
hasAttributes.description: The number of cash withdrawal transactions made on the card each month.

hasAttributes.name: numberoftransactions
hasAttributes.description: The number of transactions made on the card each month.

hasAttributes.name: productName
hasAttributes.description: This is how the Bank (issuer) markets the card and is the name known to the customer.

hasAttributes.name: purchasingLimit
hasAttributes.description: The maximum amount that the customer can spend using the card.

hasAttributes.name: purchasinglimit_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the purchasing limit in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: purchasinglimit_default
hasAttributes.description: The total amount that the customer can spend on the card. Value should be converted to base currency.

hasAttributes.name: status
hasAttributes.description: The status of the card (i.e. active, not active, stolen etc.).

hasAttributes.name: withdrawalLimit
hasAttributes.description: The maximum amount that the customer can withdraw as cash using the card.

hasAttributes.name: withdrawallimit_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the withdrawal limit in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: withdrawallimit_default
hasAttributes.description: The total amount that the customer can withdraw as cash from the card. Value should be converted to base currency.

definitions.description: A payment card issued by a bank to an account holder enabling the account holder to make payments or purchases, paying back the balance to the issuing bank, plus interest.
